english translation text: Put your right cheek on the Mohr and recite:
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: عَفَّرْتُ وَجْهِي فِي التُّرَابِ وَحُقَّ لِي أَنْ أَسْجُدَ لَكَ
english translation text: I am putting my face on the ground and it is my duty to prostrate myself before You

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
